name: SHORT EXPIRY - CLEARANCE: Bonnie Adult Dog Food Canned Lamb Chunks inGravy 415g
shortDescription: (4 pieces minimum order) Fully balanced, lamb protein-containing all-natural canned dog food carefully formulated by dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds.
description: Bonnie Lamb Chunks in Gravy Adult Dog Canned Food , fully balanced, lamb protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 6.5 Crude Oils & Fats (%) - 3.5 Crude Fiber (%) - 0.3 Moisture (%) - 82 Crude Ash (%) - 2.0 Vitamin E (Min) - 240 IE/kg Vitamin D3 (Min) - 150 IE/kg Copper - 10 mg/kg Manganese - 1.9 mg/kg Zinc - 0.4 mg/kg INGREDIENTS: Meat and Animal Derivatives (Lamb 4% min.), Cereals, Minerals, Vegetable by Products, Sugar. MINERALS: Iron, Copper, Iodine, Manganese, Zinc, Selenium VITAMINS: Vit. E, Vit. D FEEDING RECOMMENDATION: See information below. The individual necessity depends on age, breed or activity. Serve at room temperature. DOG SIZE (Cans per meal) Toy (up to 5kg): up to 1 can Small (5-10kg): 1 - 2 cans Medium (10-20kg): 2 - 3 cans Large (20-35kg): 3 - 5 cans
